Container.Name: AI-3D-Hub
Container.Overview: AI-3D-Hub is a lightning-fast, self-hosted Digital Asset Manager specifically built for 3D printing files (STL, 3MF, etc.). It features a built-in AI assistant (via Anthropic Claude) to automatically generate SEO-optimized titles and descriptions for platforms like Makerworld or Printables based on your project's problem, target audience, and features.
Container.Requires: Anthropic API Key (Claude) for AI features.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The port the WebUI runs on.

Config.Name: Database Storage
Config.Description: Path to store the SQLite database securely.

Config.Name: 3D Assets Storage
Config.Description: Path where your actual 3D models and images are stored. You can map this to an existing share.

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Your Claude API Key for text generation. E.g. sk-ant-...
